title: 18 USC 1956
summary: US money laundering statute - up to 20 years imprisonment and $500,000 per violation.

title: Bank Secrecy Act
summary: US law requiring financial institutions to assist in detecting and preventing money laundering via CTRs, SARs, and KYC.

title: FATF 40 Recommendations
summary: International AML/CFT standards. Defines 3 stages of money laundering: placement, layering, integration.
